message.content:
{
  "analysis": "The shell prompt is clean. No `/app/model.bin` has been verified yet. I need to inspect current state and artifacts, then run a clean final workflow. The prepared `/app/work/train.txt` and `/app/work/test.txt` exist with 650k/10k rows. Earlier word-only models were small but below 0.62 local accuracy, so I will use a stronger word-only configuration and quantize if needed. First I will inspect state and any partial grid results/logs to avoid unnecessary work.",
  "plan": "Run a single state-inspection command: kill stray fastText processes, verify none remain, print grid results, list grid/model artifacts, check `/app/model.bin`, and tail grid logs. This will inform the exact next training/quantization workflow.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "echo '--- state inspection ---'
for p in /proc/[0-9]*; do
  cmd=$(tr '\0' ' ' < "$p/cmdline" 2>/dev/null)
  case "$cmd" in
    *fasttext*) echo "killing ${p##*/}: $cmd"; kill -KILL "${p##*/}" 2>/dev/null || true;;
  esac
done
sleep 2
grep -l 'fasttext' /proc/*/comm 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo 'no fasttext procs'
echo '--- grid results ---'
cat /app/work/grid_results.txt 2>/dev/null || echo 'no grid_results.txt'
echo '--- grid/model artifacts ---'
ls -lh /app/work/grid_*.* /app/work/model_final.* /app/work/model_clean.* /app/model.bin 2>/dev/null || echo 'no relevant artifacts'
echo '--- grid logs tail ---'
for f in /app/work/grid_*.log; do echo "=== $f ==="; tail -8 "$f" 2>/dev/null; done
",
      "duration": 12.0
    }
  ]
}
